# Files the Slim Minima security-update button overwrites from the release tag.
# This is the "security layer": only security-critical framework code lives here.
# The button never touches your blocks, theme, layout, or content.
#
# Lines starting with # are comments. Paths may be files or directories.
src/lib/auth.ts
src/lib/api-auth.ts
src/lib/contact-token.ts
src/lib/updates.ts
src/lib/mcp
src/app/api/auth
src/app/api/admin/upload-signature
src/app/api/cron
.github/security-paths.txt
.github/workflows/slim-minima-security-update.yml
